future_consumption.AG27: Supabase/Auth/Backend Decision Checkpoint should consume AG26 role, workflow and approval-gate models to decide whether backend activation remains deferred or enters a separately approved activation path.
future_consumption.AG28_to_AG40: Backend/Auth/dynamic publishing stages may consume AG26 only if AG27 explicitly approves backend activation.
future_consumption.future_static_path: If backend remains deferred, AG26 models remain manual governance references for static/GitHub-controlled production.
